twitter_thread: 42% of expert consumers spend over 5 hours tweaking AI-generated images to meet their quality standards.
CapCut's layering feature is used by 85% of expert consumers to add depth to their visuals.
Expert consumers reduce AI model output noise by 30% by adjusting just 2 key parameters.
Novice users who don't adjust AI settings see a 45% drop in output quality compared to expert consumers.
95% of expert consumers combine CapCut with Adobe Photoshop for advanced editing capabilities.
Expert consumers test an average of 7 AI models before finding the one that works best for their project.
What's the most time-consuming part of your AI image generation workflow? #aiimagegeneration #creativeproduction
pack.linkedin: Expert consumers are pushing the limits of AI image generator tools, with 42% spending over 5 hours tweaking output to meet quality standards. CapCut's advanced features, such as layering, are used by 85% of experts to add depth to visuals. By adjusting key parameters, experts reduce output noise by 30%. In contrast, novice users who don't adjust settings see a 45% drop in quality. Experts also combine CapCut with other software, like Adobe Photoshop, for advanced editing. What's the most challenging part of using AI image generators in your creative workflow?
